overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring the sun-drenched Mediterranean-style city of Toussaint. The character descends terraced walkways adorned with red roses, passes NPCs relaxing at outdoor tables, navigates through covered archways, and walks along cobblestone streets lined with colorful historic buildings.

events.description: begins descending wide stone staircase lined with flower pots
passes close to NPCs standing on narrow terrace walkway

agents.ego_description: walking down stone stairs on a sunlit terrace lined with potted red roses and balustrades

notable_agents.action: two NPCs standing and conversing on the terrace stairs

entered.detail: terracotta roof tiles visible on distant buildings across the landscape
wide stone stairs with worn steps descending the terrace level
large round terracotta pots containing red flowering bushes
ornate carved stone railing along the terrace edge
blue mountain range visible in the background beyond the city

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sun-drenched elevated terrace with views of distant mountains and red-tiled roofs. Geralt descends a wide stone staircase lined with large terracotta planters full of red roses, passing two NPCs conversing on the landing. The camera follows the descent, revealing ornate stone balustrades and the expansive landscape beyond.

events.description: pauses briefly near outdoor seating area to observe the view
turns around and begins ascending stairs back to upper level

agents.ego_description: pausing at a terrace overlook near NPCs seated at a table, then turning to ascend stairs

notable_agents.action: two NPCs seated at a small round table eating and drinking

entered.detail: small round stone table with chairs where NPCs are seated
stone seating along the terrace wall
faded painted murals on the terrace wall depicting figures

segments.scene_description: Geralt reaches a lower terrace level where two NPCs sit at an outdoor dining table. The area features decorative wall murals and stone benches. After a brief pause, the character turns and begins ascending another staircase, with the red tile roofs now visible to the left and a guard standing watch at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with pergola and garden

events.description: passes painter NPC working at easel under wooden pergola
enters covered stone archway passage with red pillars

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow elevated walkway past a painter working on a canvas, heading toward a covered archway

notable_agents.action: painter seated at wooden easel painting a colorful floral canvas

entered.detail: wooden beam structure overhead supporting climbing vines
wooden artist easel with colorful canvas depicting flowers
arched stone entrance leading to covered corridor
large potted olive or citrus trees in terracotta containers

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow elevated walkway shaded by a wooden pergola and dense greenery. A painter works at an easel on the left, capturing the vibrant flowers. The path continues past potted trees toward a stone archway entrance that leads into a covered corridor, transitioning from open terrace to enclosed passage.

events.description: briefly exits into sunlit courtyard then enters darker covered section
enters dimly lit covered walkway with faded murals on walls

agents.ego_description: walking through covered stone archways and corridors, transitioning from light to shadow

notable_agents.action: child NPC running along the corridor wall

entered.detail: roofed stone passage with arched ceiling
faded frescoes and paintings covering the corridor walls
thick columns painted red supporting the corridor roof

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a covered stone corridor where the lighting shifts to shadow. The walls feature faded murals and are supported by thick red pillars. After a brief glimpse of a sunlit courtyard, the path continues through a darker section of the covered walkway where a child runs along the wall, eventually approaching the exit back to open air.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cobblestone street with colorful townhouses

events.description: exits covered corridor into bright sunlit cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: walking along a sunlit cobblestone street lined with colorful Mediterranean-style buildings and flower boxes

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue dress walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: irregular stone paving stones forming the street surface
vibrant orange and yellow plaster facades with shuttered windows
decorative carved balustrades lining the street edge
pointed roof tower visible at the end of the street
window boxes with red flowers on the building facades

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered corridor, the scene opens into a bright sunlit cobblestone street lined with colorful townhouses in vibrant oranges and yellows. Ornate stone railings edge the walkway, and flower boxes adorn the windows. Geralt follows a pedestrian ahead toward a tall spired building visible at the end of the street, with red tile roofs now prominent in the center view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched elevated terrace down through shaded corridors and finally into a vibrant city street. It begins with a descent down wide stone staircases lined with red roses and terracotta planters, passing conversing NPCs while overlooking a landscape of red-tiled roofs and distant mountains. As the camera reaches a lower terrace with outdoor dining areas, it ascends again toward a narrow walkway shaded by a wooden pergola and dense greenery where a painter works at an easel. The scene then shifts from open air into a covered stone corridor, where the lighting transitions to deep shadow among red pillars and faded murals before passing a running child. Finally, the camera emerges from the darkness into a bright cobblestone street lined with colorful orange and yellow townhouses, following a pedestrian toward a tall spired building under the open sky.
